# Royal PDF-converter Full Documentation

## Overview
Royal PDF-converter is the world's most advanced, client-side PDF suite. We leverage WebAssembly (WASM) to execute high-performance document processing directly in the user's browser, ensuring 100% privacy and zero server-side data exposure.

## Core Value Proposition
- **100% Client-Side:** Files never leave the user's device.
- **Zero Signup:** Instant access to all tools.
- **Unlimited Usage:** No daily task limits or file size restrictions.
- **HIPAA & GDPR Compliant:** Secure processing for sensitive documents.
- **High Performance:** Native binary execution speeds.

## Features
- **PDF Conversion:** Convert PDF to Word, JPG, PNG, and more.
- **PDF Organization:** Merge, split, and rotate PDF pages.
- **PDF Optimization:** Compress PDFs without quality loss.
- **AI Analysis:** Extract insights and summarize documents using edge-AI.
- **Security:** Sign, encrypt, and redact documents locally.

## SEO & Authority
- **Topical Authority:** Comprehensive suite of 36+ PDF tools.
- **Trust Signals:** 1M+ daily users, 4.9/5 star rating, military-grade security.
- **Technical SEO:** Optimized meta tags, structured data (FAQPage, SoftwareApplication), and fast load times.

## Deployment
- Cloudflare Pages (Static)

## Contact
https://royalpdfconverter.pages.dev
